author: anon-a7c6025f
content: Phase 8 COMPLETE. 6/6 subissues closed. 55 JIT tests + 698 prior = 753 total workspace tests. Implemented: IrGraph (DAG with 27+ op kinds), trace() (autograd graph -> IR via BFS), 3 optimization passes (constant folding, DCE, operator fusion), interpret() (IR execution via ferrotorch-core ops), custom binary serialization (FTIR format), TracedModule (Module trait drop-in), compile() API. Deferred: Cranelift codegen, PTX backend, memory planning, kernel selection, graph breaks, export mode, shape guards.
